notes: Carey complete mode now adapts to the backend: remote keeps xl-turbo / xl-base, while localhost uses turbo / base / sft.
Localhost complete requests now send explicit model choices that line up with gary4local's new Carey XL toggle and routing logic.
Turbo remains fixed at 8 steps / CFG 1.0, while base and sft keep editable steps / CFG for slower higher-control runs.
Close your DAW before replacing plugin files with a downloaded update.
